ash_writ_deserter.name: Ash-Writ Deserter
ash_writ_deserter.desc: You walked away from a military pyre. The writ still burns.
ash_writ_deserter.checkBonus: Martial supply and Free Spear checks take +1.
ash_writ_deserter.drawback: Iron Lantern patrols recognize deserter patterns. Higher patrol heat.
ash_writ_deserter.flavor: The ash never entirely washed out.

ledger_thief.name: Ledger-Thief of Gallowsford
ledger_thief.desc: The first page you stole was proof of a crime you hadn't committed yet.
ledger_thief.checkBonus: Blackmail, paper, and Rookery checks take +1.
ledger_thief.drawback: Legal pressure ticks upward. Gallowsford remembers its missing pages.
ledger_thief.flavor: You can still smell the inkwell you knocked over.

synod_scribe.name: Disgraced Synod Scribe
synod_scribe.desc: You copied one prayer too many and learned what the saints erased.
synod_scribe.checkBonus: Synod, infirmary, and ritual checks take +1.
synod_scribe.drawback: Prior Halvek marked your name. Faith routes close faster under scrutiny.
synod_scribe.flavor: The erased verse still rhymes in the dark.

free_spear_bastard.name: Free Spear Bastard
free_spear_bastard.desc: Your father rode with the Compact. Your mother buried him before you could.
free_spear_bastard.checkBonus: Supply escort and Free Spear checks take +1.
free_spear_bastard.drawback: The Synod sees Free Spear blood and marks you as unreliable.
free_spear_bastard.flavor: You wear no spear but everyone looks for one anyway.

rookery_door_man.name: Rookery Door-Man
rookery_door_man.desc: You kept a door no one was supposed to find and let through a debt no one could pay.
rookery_door_man.checkBonus: Undercity, Rookery, and sly route checks take +1.
rookery_door_man.drawback: The Red Ledger knows every door you opened. Debt pressure deepens.
rookery_door_man.flavor: You still flinch when hinges creak.

red_ledger_debtor.name: Red Ledger Debtor
red_ledger_debtor.desc: You signed with blood and borrowed a name. The interest is still collecting.
red_ledger_debtor.checkBonus: Blackmail, debt, and Red Ledger route checks take +1.
red_ledger_debtor.drawback: Debt pressure rises over time. The Ledger never forgets.
red_ledger_debtor.flavor: The debt mark still stings when someone speaks your true name.

cinder_veil_touched.name: Cinder Veil Touched
cinder_veil_touched.desc: A dead voice spoke your name once. It hasn't stopped yet.
cinder_veil_touched.checkBonus: Occult, Cinder Veil, and Synod Archive checks take +1.
cinder_veil_touched.drawback: The Ash-Sleeved Stranger notices when you listen. Uncanny pressure builds.
cinder_veil_touched.flavor: You hear bells other people can't.

hearthbound_corpse_kin.name: Hearthbound Corpse-Kin
hearthbound_corpse_kin.desc: You buried half your family before you turned sixteen. The other half buried you in debt and prayer.
hearthbound_corpse_kin.checkBonus: Hearth, mercy, and Synod mercy checks take +1.
hearthbound_corpse_kin.drawback: The dead-name plot draws you closer. Refusing mercy hurts worse.
hearthbound_corpse_kin.flavor: You can still smell the funeral lilies.
